title: FOOD GLEANING - 211info
text: GLEANING NETWORK OF SOUTHERN OREGON FOOD GLEANING Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers produce and collects food donations. Provides a community gardening program where community members can grow produce for themselves. Food is distributed monthly and members will be called when pick-ups are available. On average 40 pounds of food will be provided. 201 Bateman Drive #13 and #14 Central Point, OR 97502 Eligibility: Low-income households Hours: No standard hours; food pick-up for members is by appointment only Email (541) 665-1500 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Message phone (541) 665-1500 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in or call for more information FEES: $60 for three months of food. $45 for three months for older adults. DOCUMENTS: Completed membership application AREA SERVED: Jackson County Services: Community Gardening Food Banks/Food Distribution Warehouses Food Cooperatives Food Gleaning Programs Other Services Offered At This Location: FOOD - EMERGENCY BOXES If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. GLEANING NETWORK OF SOUTHERN OREGON
